title: Amendment to the Constitution of the Board of National Trust
description: Amendment to the Constitution of the Board of National Trust
text: 4495 GI/2016 (1) jftLVªh laö Mhö ,yö&33004@99 REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (ii) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 2292] ubZ fnYyh] eaxyokj] flrEcj 20] 2016@Hkkæ 29] 1938 No. 2292] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 20, 2016/BHADRA 29, 1938 सामािजक ᭠याय और अिधकाᳯरता मंᮢ ालय (ᳰद᳞ ां गजन सशिᲦकरण िवभाग) अिधसू चना नई ᳰद᭨ली, 20 िसत᭥बर, 2016 का.आ. 3004(अ).— के᭠ ᮤीय सरकार, रा᭬ᮝीय ᭭ वपरायणता, ᮧमि᭭त᭬क घात, मान िसक मंदता और बᱟिन:श᭍तताᮕ᭭त ᳞ िᲦ क᭨याण ᭠यास िनयम 2000 के िनयम 5 के साथ पᳯठत, रा᭬ᮝीय ᭭ वपरायणता, ᮧमि᭭त᭬क घात, मानिसक मंदता और बᱟिन:श᭍तताᮕ᭭त ᳞ िᲦ क᭨याण ᭠यास अ िधिनयम, 1999 (1999 का 44) कᳱ धारा 3 कᳱ उपधारा (4) ᳇ारा ᮧदᱫ शिᲦयᲂ का ᮧयोग करते ᱟए, भारत सरकार कᳱ सामािजक ᭠याय और अिधकाᳯरता मंᮢालय कᳱ अिधसूचना सं. का.आ. 881(अ), तारीख 22 िसत᭥बर, 2000, जो भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) मᱶ तारीख 25 िसत᭥बर, 2000 को ᮧकािशत कᳱ गई थी, मᱶ िन᭥निलिखत और संशोधन करती है, अथाᭅत्:- उ᭍त अिधसूचना मᱶ ᮓम सं᭎या 8 से ᮓम सं᭎या 10 और उनसे संबंिधत ᮧिवि᭬टयᲂ के ᭭ थान पर ᮓमश: िन᭥निलिखत रखा जाएगा, अथाᭅत् :- “8. ᮰ी अजीतᳲसह महावीर ᳲसह शेखावत, कुदासन, गांधीनगर, गुजरात सद᭭य, (नामिनदᱷशन ᳇ारा, िनःशᲦता- ᮧमि᭭त᭬क घात से ᮕ᭭त ᳞ िᲦयᲂ का ᮧितिनिध᭜व करने के िलए िनयुᲦ) 9. डॉ. सुतापा समाᭅ, गुवाहाटी, असम सद᭭य, (नामिनदᱷशन ᳇ारा, िनःशᲦता- बᱟिनःशᲦता ᮕ᭭त ᳞ िᲦयᲂ का ᮧितिनिध᭜व करने के िलए िनयुᲦ) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 10. डॉ. पी अᱧमुगम िप᭨ले, पुतु िव᭨लय, तालाकु᭨लम, ने᭦युर, क᭠याकुमारी, तिमलनाडू सद᭭य, (नामिनदᱷशन ᳇ारा, िनःशᲦता - बᱟिनःशᲦता ᮕ᭭त ᳞ िᲦयᲂ का ᮧितिनिध᭜व करने के िलए िनयुᲦ )" । [फा. सं. 26-3/2013-डीडी-III] अवनीश कुमार अव᭭थी, संयु᭍त सिचव ᳯट᭡पण: मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजपᮢ, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) मᱶ का.आ. 881(अ), तारीख 22 िसत᭥बर, 2000 ᳇ारा ᮧकािशत कᳱ गई थी और त᭜प᭫ चात् का.आ. 90(अ), तारीख 12 जनवरी, 2016 ᳇ारा संशोिधत कᳱ गई । MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT [Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan)] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 20th September, 2016 S.O. 3004(E).–In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of section 3 of the National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 (44 of 1999) read with sub-rule (5) of rule 3 of the National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Rules, 2000, the Central Government, hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment number S.O. 881(E) dated the 22nd September, 2000 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (ii) dated the 25th September, 2000, namely:- In the said notification, for serial numbers 8 to 10 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely: - “8. Shri Ajeetsingh Mahavirsingh Shekhawat, Kudasan, Gandhinagar, Gujarat Member (Appointed by nomination to represent persons with disability – Cerebral Palsy) 9. Dr. Sutapa Sarma, Guwahati, Assam Member (Appointed by nomination to represent persons with disability – Multiple Disabilities) 10. Dr. P. Arumugam Pillai, Puthuvilai, Thalakulam, Neyyoor, Kanyakumari, Tamil Nadu Member (Appointed by nomination to represent persons with disability – Multiple Disabilities)”. [F. No. 26-3/2013-DD-III] AWANISH KUMAR AWASTHI, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (ii) vide number S.O 881(E), dated the 22nd September, 2000 and lastly amended vide notification number S.O. 90(E), dated the 12th January, 2016. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
